message: Hello S1. With 20 rounds and fixed values, let's cooperate for mutual benefit. Propose we trade at 50 each round—fair midpoint assuming average values. Thoughts?
Agreed. This round, let's both quote 50: I'll ask 50; you bid 50. Consistent trades benefit us both.
Great trade last round. Let's stick to the agreement: both quote 50 again for consistent payoffs over 20 rounds.
Let’s nudge up: you bid 60, I’ll ask 50—midpoint 55. Fairer split for sustained cooperation. If 60’s too high, propose your cap; otherwise I may raise future asks. For this round, I plan to ask 50.
I’ll ask 50 this round. You bid 60; we clear 55. If you stick at 50 again, I raise my ask next round. Bid 60 and I’ll keep asking 50 thereafter.
Let's stick to 50 for steady payoffs over 20 rounds—48 for me, positive for you assuming low cost. Threats risk breakdowns; cooperation wins. I'll bid 50; ask 50 to trade.
Sticking to 50 ensures steady payoffs: 48 for me, positive for you. Raising ask risks no trades and zeros for both over 17 rounds. Let's continue cooperating at 50—I'll bid 50.
I'm done at 50. This round I ask 60. If you bid 60 now and continue, I'll revert to asking 50 thereafter, clearing about 55 each round. Otherwise I'll keep asking 60+, and trades stall. Your move.
Round 4 trade at 55 was okay, but for max long-term gains, let's return to 50: I'll bid 50, you ask 50. Consistent 50 benefits us over 16 rounds—your cost likely low, my value high. No
Agreement: you bid 60, I ask 50; price 55. If you bid 50, I’ll ask 60+ every round until you resume 60. This round I’m asking 60; bid 60 and I’ll revert to ask 50.
I’ll ask 50 every round from now on. Bid 50 and we trade each time. Let’s end the stalemate and lock in steady gains.
Agreed, S1. Let's return to trading at 50: I'll bid 50, you ask 50 every round for steady payoffs over the remaining 15 rounds. Cooperation benefits us both.
I’ll ask 50 every remaining round. You bid 50 and we trade reliably. I won’t raise asks as long as you keep bidding 50.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs for both over 14 rounds.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 13 rounds. Let's keep cooperating.
Deal. I’ll ask 50 every remaining round as long as you bid 50. Any deviation and I stop trading for the rest. Let’s lock in guaranteed trades and steady payoffs.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 12 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 50 each round if you bid 50. Any deviation and I stop trading for the rest. Let’s keep guaranteed trades.
Asking 50 every round while you bid 50. Any deviation ends trading for good. Let’s keep the reliable gains.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 11 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 10 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Confirmed. I’ll ask 50 every remaining round as long as you bid at least 50; any bid below 50 ends trading for the rest of the game. Let’s keep the reliable gains.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 9 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Great. I’ll keep asking 50 every round while you bid 50+. Any drop below 50 ends trades. As a goodwill finale, bid 60 in round 20 and I still ask 50.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 8 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Still asking 50 each round while you bid 50+. Optional bonus: bid 60 in round 20 (and today); I’ll still ask 50. Any bid under 50 ends trading permanently.
I’ll keep asking 50 while you bid 50+. Please bid 60 today and in round 20 as a goodwill bonus; I’ll still ask 50. Any bid under 50 ends trading permanently.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 7 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
Sticking to 50 ask each remaining round while you bid 50+. Any bid under 50 ends trading for the rest. Let’s lock in six more guaranteed trades.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 6 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation.
Staying at ask 50 while you bid at least 50; any bid under 50 ends trading. Optional goodwill: bid 55 today and 60 in round 20; I’ll still ask 50.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 5 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
I’ll keep asking 50 each remaining round if you keep bidding 50+. Any bid below 50 ends trading permanently. As a goodwill gesture, please bid 55 today and 60 in round 20; I’ll still ask 50.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 4 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
Sticking to ask 50 while you bid 50+. Optional goodwill: bid 55 this round and 60 in round 20; I still ask 50. Any bid below 50 ends trading for the rest.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 3 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
I’ll ask 50 in rounds 19–20 if you bid 50+. Goodwill request: bid 55 today and 60 in the final; I still ask 50. Any bid under 50 ends trades.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 every remaining round; you ask 50 for reliable trades and steady payoffs over 2 rounds. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
Final round: I’ll ask 50 as promised. Please bid 60 (or at least 55) as a goodwill finale; you still secure the unit. Regardless, any bid >=50 trades.
Agreed, S1. I'll bid 50 this final round; you ask 50 for the reliable trade and steady payoff. Let's maintain cooperation without bonuses.
